title: Bottom line
subtitle: Methode entscheidet nicht über den Sieger.

creator_metrics.note: hype tie counted separately (6 hits + 1 tie-match)

cost_note: T08 AI agents run: $0.24. T07 censorship-density analysis via Claude/OpenRouter: $0.03. Deterministic methods were free.
conclusion_line_german: Methode entscheidet nicht über den Sieger. Denominator entscheidet.
conclusion_line_english: The method doesn't decide the winner. The denominator does.
footnote: Agreement measured against IT-Mario's declared winners. See T09, T05 for details.

censorship_finding.verdict_on_papaplatte_50pct_claim: directionally supported (can't measure absolute drop without a gold transcript; the 38× gap vs apored on the same platform is unambiguous)
